# Generated GDScript Bindings — `smoke_test` module

These files are generated by `bash scripts/codegen/generate-gdscript-smoke-test.sh` and committed as read-only artifacts.

The pinned upstream CLI does not directly emit GDScript bindings, so the repo first generates authoritative C# bindings and then runs `scripts/codegen/generate-gdscript-bindings.py` to emit this GDScript surface.

Output directory: `tests/fixtures/gdscript_generated/smoke_test/`

Do not edit these files manually.
